mapper.select: SELECT id, se_tank_equip_code, se_tank_name, se_tank_spec, se_tank_design_volume, se_tank_operating_volume, se_tank_design_p, se_tank_operating_p, se_tank_design_t, se_tank_operating_t, se_tank_media, se_tank_material, se_tank_thickness, se_tank_seal_type, se_tank_anti_corrosion, se_tank_safety_valve_model, se_tank_install_pos, se_tank_in_service, se_tank_inspect_cycle, se_tank_last_inspect, se_tank_next_inspect, se_tank_inspect_result, se_tank_last_pressure_test, se_tank_level_gauge_model, se_tank_corrosion_status, se_tank_maintain_record, se_tank_fault_record, se_tank_operator, se_tank_create_time, se_tank_update_time, se_tank_status, se_tank_factory, se_tank_reserve1, se_tank_reserve2, se_tank_reserve3 FROM se_spherical_tank
